deadline_notes: Annual CPE by December 31. Rolling 3-year 120hr total.
notes: 4hr Board-approved WY-specific ethics (WYSCPA/CPEthink/AccountingTools only, 80% pass score required). 80hr technical minimum (67%). No carryover. Optional 90-day extension ($150 fee, to March 31, elected at renewal). Penalty CPE: lesser of shortage or 16hr. Graduated new licensee rules (0/60/120). No annual minimum (only rolling 3yr).
